ralplan_architect_review.summary: Architect approved final plan after verifying Telegram env handling, executable smoke preflight, non-printing secret scans, smoke profile ignore/untracked handoff, and preservation of no Google Sheets live read / no Telegram live send boundaries.

ralplan_critic_review.summary: Critic approved final plan as actionable without guessing. Final conditions: smoke preflight before provider smoke, run smoke with Telegram env vars unset, do not print/commit secrets or generated outputs, document missing key/provider/network blockers, update Korean docs, and verify with pytest plus staged-file and secret-safety scans.
